note: Where the strategist gathers research signals. Each repo's open issues are scanned read-only. REPLACE these with sources relevant to YOUR product. This file is local-owned (seeded, never overwritten by upgrade).

customer_demand.note: Your own repo and public feature requests in your product's domain.

competitor_gaps.note: Repos of competing products: capabilities they ship that you lack.

analogous_fields.note: Adjacent domains worth transferring ideas from.
